scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w @wien-oeffis/api" "npm run dev -w @wien-oeffis/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @wien-oeffis/shared && npm run build -w @wien-oeffis/api && npm run build -w @wien-oeffis/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @wien-oeffis/api && npm run test -w @wien-oeffis/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @wien-oeffis/shared && npm run typecheck -w @wien-oeffis/api && npm run typecheck -w @wien-oeffis/web
